description_long: This grass patch consists of a dense cluster of green blades interspersed with a base of dark blue-green foliage, giving it a lush and vibrant appearance. The blades vary in height and orientation, some standing upright while others splay outward, creating a natural, untamed look. The base appears slightly mounded, with the grass blades emerging from various points, suggesting a healthy, thriving patch. The coloration transitions from deep blue-green at the core to brighter green at the tips of the blades, adding depth and realism. There are no visible signs of litter or debris, and the edges of the patch blend softly into the surrounding area, indicating a natural integration with its environment. This type of grass patch would be commonly found in urban parks, roadside verges, or landscaped green spaces.
description: A lush, dense patch of green grass blades with a dark blue-green base, blending naturally into its surroundings. The blades are varied in height and orientation, creating a realistic, untamed look.
description_view_0: From this view, the grass patch appears elongated with blades fanning out to the left and right, and the dense blue-green base is most visible in the center.
description_view_1: This angle shows the patch as more compact, with taller blades concentrated toward the left and right edges, and the base appearing more rounded.
description_view_2: Here, the patch looks wider, with grass blades splaying outward in multiple directions and the blue-green base stretching horizontally.
description_view_3: This view highlights the patch's depth, with a prominent mound of blue-green foliage and blades emerging upward and outward, especially on the right.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_e: The grass patch blends softly into adjacent surfaces, with no sharp separation, suggesting a natural transition to soil or other landscaping.
